overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through a dark, moonlit wilderness. The character travels through open grasslands, rocky terrain, and approaches a forested area with wooden fencing.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through open grassland with two swords strapped to back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the grassland
open grassy fields extending to the horizon
open grassy fields with scattered wildflowers
low shrubs and vegetation flanking the path
low shrubs and vegetation flanking the path
dark mountain silhouettes on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through open grassland at night. The landscape is illuminated by moonlight with a cool blue-green tint, revealing scattered bushes and distant mountains on the horizon.

events.description: large grey rock outcrops appear on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path passing large rock formations on the left side

entered.detail: large grey boulders and rocky terrain beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path continues through terrain with large rock outcrops appearing on the left. The environment becomes slightly more enclosed as the rocks flank the trail, while open grassland remains visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with wooden fence posts

events.description: wooden fence posts appear on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the curving path toward denser forest area with wooden fencing

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence posts lining the right side of the path
thick cluster of trees ahead marking the forest edge

segments.scene_description: The trail curves toward a denser forest area with wooden fence posts appearing on the right. The rocky outcrops fall behind as the character approaches the tree line, with vegetation becoming thicker and more enclosed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit wilderness that transitions from open grasslands into a dense, enclosed forest. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path under a cool blue-green moonlight, with scattered bushes and distant mountains visible across the horizon. As the journey continues, the landscape shifts as large rock outcrops begin to flank the left side of the trail, narrowing the field of view. The scene then curves away from the rocky terrain toward a thicker tree line, where wooden fence posts appear on the right. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly enclosed as the character enters the forest and the vegetation grows denser.
